_description: ContactOut People Search API (POST https://api.contactout.com/v1/people/search) query parameter specification. Use this schema to map AutoSourcing.html form fields into a valid ContactOut search payload.

name.description: Full or partial name of the person to search for.
name.source_field: keywords (if it looks like a person name)

job_title.description: Job titles held by the people you want to find. Accepts an array of job titles (max 50). A person is included if they match any one of the supplied titles. Accepts Boolean expressions.

job_function.description: Job functions to filter profiles by their functional area. Accepts Boolean expressions. Examples: Engineering, Marketing, Sales, Finance, Operations.

company.description: Company names to filter by. A person is included if their current employer matches any of these names.

company_size.description: Company size ranges to filter by. Use only when a company size preference is explicitly requested.

industry.description: Industry sectors to filter by. Infer from keywords or job titles when appropriate.

skills.description: Skills or technologies the person should have. Infer from job titles or keywords when appropriate.

location.description: Locations where people live or work. Accepts city names, country names, or region names.

keyword.description: Free-text keyword string to filter results. Searches across name, title, company, skills, and bio fields.

education.description: Educational institution names, degrees, or fields of study. Only include when explicitly searching for education background.

seniority.description: Seniority level filter. Infer from job titles when possible.

years_of_experience.description: Years of experience range. Only include when explicitly requested.

page.description: Page number for pagination (1-based). Set by the caller — do not map from form fields.

limit.description: Number of results to return per page. Set by the caller — do not map from form fields.

people.description: List of matching person profiles (also check 'profiles' and 'results' keys for alternate response formats)

item_fields.linkedin_url: LinkedIn profile URL — use as the primary link
item_fields.name: Full name
item_fields.title: Current job title
item_fields.headline: Profile headline (fallback for title)
item_fields.company: Current employer (may be an object with 'name' key)

response_fields.total: Estimated total number of matching profiles
